albums.exclude_reason: Duplicate of 0idXUzmjcWMeDnVgSTWjqy; movie soundtrack (songs), not a Hörspiel

series.curator_notes: Series contains two distinct sub-series: TV series episodes (Folge 1-12, released 2020, Edelkids) and movie Hörspiele (parts 1-6, released 2021, LEONINE Audio). TV episodes contain 2-3 complete stories per album; movie Hörspiele are chapter-based audiobook adaptations. Assigned episode numbers 1-12 for TV series and 101-106 for movie Hörspiele to preserve ordering. Two 2003 soundtrack albums excluded as they contain songs from the movie, not narrative Hörspiele.

splits.reason: The movie Hörspiele (Die wilden Kerle 1-6) are based on the live-action films and are a different product from the TV series Hörspiele (Folge 1-12). They have different target audiences (slightly older kids for the movies), different production styles (live-action vs animated), and different numbering systems. From a parent's perspective, these would be confusing mixed together - a parent looking for TV series episodes would not expect to find movie adaptations mixed in. Splitting them into separate series provides a clearer browsing experience.

review.notes: The series was mixing two distinct products: (1) TV series Hörspiele (Folge 1-12, animated, original storytelling) and (2) Movie Hörspiele (Die wilden Kerle 1-6, live-action film adaptations). These have been split into separate series for clarity. The excluded items are correctly identified as movie soundtracks (songs), not Hörspiele.

override_verdicts.reason: Movie Hörspiel correctly identified as different product from TV series - clearly labeled 'Das Hörspiel zum Kinofilm' with different label (LEONINE Audio vs Edelkids) and different numbering (1-6 vs Folge 1-12). Appropriate to split.

Movie Hörspiel correctly identified as different product from TV series - clearly labeled 'Das Hörspiel zum Kinofilm' with different label and different target demographic (film adaptations are for slightly older kids). Appropriate to split.
Movie Hörspiel (part 5) - appropriate to split as it's a Kinofilm adaptation, not original TV series content.
Movie Hörspiel (part 4) - appropriate to split as it's a Kinofilm adaptation. The track structure shows chapters numbered 01-25 with uniform durations typical of movie adaptations.

Movie Hörspiel correctly identified as different product - labeled 'Das Hörspiel zum Kinofilm', released 2021 by LEONINE Audio, vs TV series 'Folge 1-12' from Edelkids. Different production (live-action film adaptation vs animated TV series). Appropriate to split.

Movie Hörspiel (part 3) - appropriate to split as Kinofilm adaptation. All 6 movie Hörspiele (parts 1-6) share the same release date (2021-10-29) and label (LEONINE Audio), confirming they are a distinct product line from the TV series.

split_verdicts.reason: Good split: The 6 movie Hörspiele (Die wilden Kerle 1-6) are clearly distinct from the 12 TV series episodes (Folge 1-12). They have different: (1) Source material - live-action films vs animated TV series, (2) Labels - LEONINE Audio vs Edelkids, (3) Release timing - all 2021 vs 2020, (4) Numbering - 1-6 vs Folge 1-12, (5) Subtitle style - 'Das Hörspiel zum Kinofilm' vs 'Das Original-Hörspiel zur TV-Serie'. This would indeed be confusing for parents browsing for episodes. Valid split.
